commands.review_summary:
The PR mirrors the accepted Codex app-server user prompt immediately after turn acceptance and adds a regression test for early transcript visibility plus final dedupe.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but I did not run a live Feishu/WebChat reproduction. Current main only mirrors the Codex prompt after `await completion`, while the linked issue gives concrete external-channel steps.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer real behavior proof before merge; no narrow automated code repair is indicated.

target.title: fix(codex): mirror accepted prompts early
target.body:
## Summary
- Mirror the accepted Codex app-server user prompt as soon as the turn has a stable id.
- Reuse the existing `turnId:prompt` mirror identity and thread-scoped idempotency so the final transcript mirror dedupes the prompt.
- Add a regression test that checks the session transcript contains the user message before turn completion and still only has one user row after final mirroring.

Fixes #83528

## Proof
- RED: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion"` failed before the production change with `ENOENT` for `session.jsonl`, proving the accepted prompt was not mirrored before completion.
- GREEN targeted: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion"` passed.
- Regression surface: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/transcript-mirror.test.ts` passed: 197 tests.
- Formatting: `git diff --check` passed.
- Targeted lint: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts` passed.
- Changed gate: `pnpm check:changed` passed conflict marker, attribution, package/dependency guards, and both extension typecheck lanes. It failed only in the broad extension lint lane on pre-existing unrelated `extensions/openrouter/provider-routing.ts` `unicorn(no-useless-fallback-in-spread)` findings; targeted lint for the touched files is clean.
- Independent review: reviewer returned pass with no security concerns and no logic errors.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
